output.dependency: A route/itinerary code (e.g., an airline+origin-destination pattern) is associated with a specific departure-time string. For the same route code, the departure time consistently matches the same formatted time-of-day value.
A route/itinerary code is associated with a specific arrival-time string (time-of-day). For the same route code, the arrival time consistently matches the same formatted time-of-day value.

Departure and arrival times are linked by the schedule for a given itinerary: the formatted departure time and formatted arrival time occur together as a consistent time pair (implying a fixed travel duration/clock-time relationship for the same itinerary context).
